description: Pairs of duties that should not be held by the same agent. Role names are matched case-insensitively against the agent's access.

conflicts.reason: The same agent can both initiate and approve payments, removing the four-eyes control over money movement.
The same agent can both create and approve vendors, enabling fraudulent payee setup.
The same agent can write code and deploy it to production with no independent review.
The same agent can manage users and audit that activity, letting it cover its own tracks.
